projectDescription: A terminal-first AI coding agent that understands your codebase, makes edits with your permission, and executes commands — optimized for keyboard-driven workflows and remote SSH sessions.
keyFeatures: Multi-step reasoning and multi-file editing via shared Antigravity agent engine
Terminal User Interface (TUI) optimized for keyboard-driven workflows
SSH/remote session support with authorization URL fallback
Tool permission modes including proceed-in-sandbox for secure command execution
Plugin discovery for custom skills and specialized agents
Bidirectional settings sync with Antigravity 2.0 GUI
Session export to Antigravity 2.0 for continued visual orchestration
publicApiSurface: /logout — clear saved credentials and sign out
/settings — open settings and color scheme selection
/resume — resume a previous session (with ctrl+delete to delete sessions)
